narrative: An AI Engineer from Vedantu with 7 years of experience, this candidate ranks #21 primarily due to their strong experience level alignment and specific technical skills for Search & Retrieval. Their background at a product company is a great fit, and their expertise in Elasticsearch, pgvector, NLP, Learning to Rank, Deep Learning, and QLoRA directly addresses key JD requirements. Located in Gurgaon, their availability and location fit for our Noida office is also strong. However, minor flags on their profile credibility require further verification.
